message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.matrix_rank wrapper parity (franken_numpy-1zul)

Add fnp_python.matrix_rank(a, tol=None, hermitian=False, *, rtol=None)
as a passthrough delegator to np.linalg.matrix_rank so the SVD-based
rank, tol/rtol precedence (rtol is keyword-only and mutually
exclusive with tol when both supplied), hermitian fast path, and
batched (..., M, N) broadcasting semantics match numpy exactly.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with seven scenarios: full-rank 3x3,
rank-deficient 3x3, 1-D nonzero vector (rank 1), explicit tol=0.5
override, keyword-only rtol=1e-3, hermitian=True on a 2x2 SPD,
and a batched stack of three 2x2 matrices (full-rank / rank-1 /
zero) compared via np.array_equal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
